steps: Create a new user account with a valid email address and login credentials
Log in to the account with the created credentials
Navigate to the account settings and click the 'Export Data' button
tests.expected_result: A CSV file containing the user's mental health data, including date, time, and entries, is sent to the user's registered email address within 5 minutes

steps: Attempt to log in with an invalid email address and login credentials
Verify that the login attempt fails and an error message is displayed
Attempt to navigate to the account settings and click the 'Export Data' button
tests.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that the user is not registered, and no CSV file is sent to the email address

steps: Log in to the system with a valid user account
Navigate to the 'About' section
Click on 'Third-Party Services'
tests.expected_result: The system displays a table with columns 'Service Name', 'Purpose', and 'Data Sharing Policy', populated with the following services: Google Analytics for usage tracking, Sentry for error tracking, and Facebook for optional social sharing, with accurate and up-to-date information.

tests.scenario: Third-Party Services Display from Settings Section
steps: Log in to the system with a valid user account
Navigate to the 'Settings' section
Click on 'Third-Party Services'
tests.expected_result: The system displays a table with columns 'Service Name', 'Purpose', and 'Data Sharing Policy', populated with the following services: Google Analytics for usage tracking, Sentry for error tracking, and Facebook for optional social sharing, with accurate and up-to-date information.

tests.scenario: Test Successful Error Display for Unavailable User Data
steps: Log in as an existing user
Simulate a failure in retrieving the user's data
Attempt to view the user's results
tests.expected_result: The system displays an error message with a specific error code and a link to contact support.

tests.scenario: Test Error Display with Correct Error Code and Support Link
steps: Log in as an existing user
Simulate a failure in retrieving the user's data with a known error code
Attempt to view the user's results
Verify the error code in the displayed error message
Verify the presence and functionality of the support link
tests.expected_result: The system displays an error message with the correct error code and a functional link to contact support.

steps: 1. Log in to the system as a valid user.
2. Enter sample data into the required fields.
3. Simulate a technical issue (e.g., server crash, network error) while the user is entering data.
4. Verify the system saves the entered data.
5. Check the system displays a recovery message with instructions.
tests.expected_result: The system saves the user's data and displays a recovery message with instructions on how to resume where they left off.

steps: 1. Log in to the system as a valid user.
2. Enter sample data into multiple required fields (e.g., name, address, phone number).
3. Simulate a technical issue (e.g., server crash, network error) while the user is entering data.
4. Verify the system saves all entered data.
5. Check the system displays a recovery message with instructions.
tests.expected_result: The system saves all the user's data and displays a recovery message with instructions on how to resume where they left off.

tests.scenario: Hover over premium feature icon as logged out user
steps: Log out of the system
Navigate to a page containing a premium feature icon
Hover over the premium feature icon
tests.expected_result: A tooltip is displayed with the exact price and a link to the subscription page

tests.scenario: Verify tooltip consistency across multiple premium features
steps: Log out of the system
Navigate to a page containing multiple premium feature icons
Hover over each premium feature icon one by one
tests.expected_result: For each premium feature icon, a tooltip is displayed with the exact price and a link to the subscription page

tests.scenario: View Last 30 Days of Mood History as Non-Subscribed User
steps: Log in as a non-subscribed user
Navigate to the mood history section
Verify the display of the last 30 days of mood history entries
tests.expected_result: The system displays a list of the last 30 days of mood history entries, including date, mood rating, and brief note for each entry, without prompting for a subscription.

tests.scenario: Verify Date Range and Details for Non-Subscribed User
steps: Log in as a non-subscribed user
Navigate to the mood history section
Check the date range of displayed mood history entries
Verify that each entry includes date, mood rating, and brief note
tests.expected_result: The system displays mood history entries for the last 30 days only, and each entry includes the date, a mood rating, and a brief note, without requiring a subscription.

steps: Log in to the app as a registered user
Navigate to the feedback page
Enter valid feedback on app usability
Click the submit button
tests.expected_result: A confirmation message is displayed that reads 'Thank you for your feedback.'

steps: Log in to the app as a registered user
Navigate to the feedback page
Leave the feedback field empty
Click the submit button
tests.expected_result: A confirmation message is displayed that reads 'Thank you for your feedback.'

steps: Log in as an administrator with valid credentials
Navigate to the dedicated feedback page
Verify that the page displays a list of submitted feedback
tests.expected_result: The system displays a list of all submitted feedback, including the user's persona ID, feedback text, and timestamp for each feedback entry.

steps: Log in as an administrator with valid credentials
Navigate to the dedicated feedback page
Verify that there is no feedback submitted
tests.expected_result: The system displays an empty list or a message indicating that no feedback has been submitted yet.

steps: Set user's reminder time to 10:00 AM
Simulate system time to 10:00 AM
Verify system sends notification to user to track mood
tests.expected_result: The user receives a notification at 10:00 AM to track their mood.

tests.scenario: Reminder Time Notification When System Time Changes
steps: Set user's reminder time to 11:30 AM
Simulate system time to 11:29 AM
Simulate system time to 11:30 AM
Verify system sends notification to user to track mood
tests.expected_result: The user receives a notification at 11:30 AM to track their mood.

steps: Create a user account and log in
Track the user's mood for 7 consecutive days with varying scores
Navigate to the weekly summary page
Verify the system generates a weekly summary
tests.expected_result: The system displays the user's average mood score and highlights notable trends or patterns in their mood history.

steps: Create a user account and log in
Track the user's mood for only 3 days
Navigate to the weekly summary page
tests.expected_result: The system does not display a weekly summary and instead prompts the user to track their mood for at least 7 days.
